message:
chore(beads): close franken_numpy-fsr5 + rebuild beads.db from JSONL

br closed fsr5 (ma comparison/logical helpers shipped in 83e1720) after
rebuilding .beads/beads.db from the canonical issues.jsonl. Old DB had
drifted to 771 issues vs JSONL's 906; per fixing-beads-problems skill,
snapshotted .beads to .beads/recovery_20260425T064523Z, then rebuilt
into a temp DB via 'br sync --import-only --rebuild --no-auto-import
--no-auto-flush', verified with 'br show fsr5' + 'br doctor', promoted
to canonical .beads/beads.db (old DB renamed .beads/beads.db.bad_*).

br sync --flush-only ran clean afterward (dirty_count=0).
